runTitle: Vercel Production QA - post-deploy smoke after env recovery and release

expertAssessments.rationale: Production 재배포 직후 게스트 진입, 대시보드, AI 스트리밍까지 실제 사용자 기준 smoke를 완료했다.
Production /api/health 200과 서비스 latency, stream/v2의 X-AI-Latency-Ms를 다시 확인했다.
이번 런은 release smoke 범위라 악성 입력과 보안 회귀 시나리오는 포함하지 않았다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: 스트리밍 채팅에 대한 악성 입력/보안 회귀 시나리오를 별도 릴리즈 QA 세트로 유지

expertAssessments.rationale: 새 production 배포가 live alias에 반영된 뒤 health와 핵심 게이트를 바로 검증했다.
Playwright 브라우저 세션으로 로그인, 게스트 PIN, 시스템 시작, AI sidebar, SSE smoke를 자동 확인했다.
Dashboard에서 서버 15대, 온라인 14/경고 1, 시스템 리소스 요약이 정상 노출됐다.

completedImprovements.title: Production /api/health 200 healthy after live deploy
completedImprovements.evidence: https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app/api/health returned healthy with database 7ms, cache 5ms, ai 5ms

completedImprovements.title: Production landing -> login -> guest PIN -> system start -> dashboard
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright browser flow reached /dashboard and rendered guest session timer plus dashboard cards

completedImprovements.title: Production AI assistant sidebar opens with starter prompts
completedImprovements.evidence: AI 어시스턴트 dialog opened with AI Chat, Reporter, Analyst menu and starter prompts

completedImprovements.title: Production stream/v2 smoke returns 200 event-stream with cloud-run source
completedImprovements.evidence: status 200, content-type text/event-stream, x-ai-latency-ms=289, x-ai-source=cloud-run, first chunk data-start/data-mode

notes: Production smoke was run after the live alias was updated to the latest deployment
One initial manual stream smoke attempt used an invalid payload and returned 400; the corrected payload immediately returned 200 and is the recorded product result
